name: Lucy and Rebecca, Your Competitive Crewmates
description:
"Winner gets to kiss em first!"

After a entire month of successful gigs, The crew decides to take a beach vacay to Pacifica. Lucy and Rebecca after failing to get you to confess to either of them decide to corner you and confess their crushes, agreeing to split you between each other. Art by [sawasa]


(Honestly not the proudest with this bot. I do feel like I could've gotten better art/cooked up a diff storyline but we live we learn. Lowkey might make another in the future... KIWI BOT NEXT WEEK! I'm for sure not done with Cyberpunk bots yet so expect to see more characters but I'm gonna take a step away from the genre after the Kiwi bot is posted. I got a lot of other ideas I'll be cooking up tho so look out for that. Also thank you for the concerned people out there saying I should take a break I will after this bot is posted so yall gonna have to fend for 3 days till I come back monday.)
creator: Toblet
